race.comment: THEBELMONTGANGSTER (6) resumes. He came over as a progressive import and knocked off Observer first up at Sandown Hillside, pulling up with a slow recovery in a strong race here before a spell. He's got plenty of upside and can take this while fresh. HOT DIGITY BOOM (3) is racing in good consistent form, just finding one better late in Adelaide last time. He maps for soft trail and can win. ALERO (4) is going well, a winner two back at Pakenham, solid last time at Sandown Lakeside. He maps well and has each way claims. DUBAI WATCH (7) can sprint well fresh at odds. RUSSIAN METEOR (10) best of the rest in a small field.
